raw_consumer_statement:
I am submitting this complaint regarding ongoing issues of fraudulent activity and account mishandling associated with my XXXX Citibank Visa card. Over time, multiple unauthorized charges have appeared on my account. Each time I reported these charges, Citibanks fraud department opened an investigation, closed the compromised account, and issued a new card. 

Despite these measures, fraudulent transactions continued to occur. On XXXX occasion, unauthorized charges were made on a replacement card that I never activated. Due to repeated issues and the lack of a permanent resolution, I made the decision to close my account entirely. After the account closure, an additional unauthorized charge was processed, and Citibank is now attempting to hold me responsible for that post-closure transaction. 

I have acted in good faith by promptly reporting all fraudulent activity and cooperating fully with each investigation. I am requesting that the CFPB review this matter and ensure that Citibank does not hold me liable for any unauthorized transactions, particularly those made after the account was officially closed and on an unactivated card.
